name: Task Counter
description: Counts open tasks per project and estimates remaining effort using story points or T-shirt sizes. Ideal for workload analysis and capacity planning.

allowedModels.description: Allowlist of provider/model keys like openai-chat/gpt-4o.

effortMapping.description: T-shirt size to story points mapping (e.g., S=1, M=3, L=5).

defaultUnestimatedEffort.description: Default story points for tasks w/o an effort estimate (used when manual override is off).

manualOverrides.description: Maps project identifiers to manual effort overrides (e.g., [{ "project": "engineering-open-source", "override": 100 }]).

includeDetails.description: If true, returns per-project task details (limited count to avoid token usage).
